title: Turn Into Baby
description: A simple datapack that lets you turn eligible mobs into babies.
body:
A very simple datapack that lets any player turn any mob that has a baby variant into said baby variant.

It works on both single player and servers.

To turn a mob into a baby, simply rename it **TurnIntoBaby** with a nametag. If it has a baby variant, it will be transformed!

To revert the changes, simply rename the baby **TurnIntoAdult** and it will grow back up!
